textByHash.4650aabb3490ec0154927c0620408a0e09a09ca7: Hey wanna trade? I'll give the best deals you can find.
textByHash.5bdc82d5930d7dcae8ebd35982d8a7f53224fad6: The general stores in Asgarnia and Misthalin are heavily taxed. It really makes it hard for them to run an effective business. For some reason taxmen don't visit my store.
textByHash.7d6e88c1bf16ef706fff2216c82f2e4f884f6ea5: Sure no problem. We'll be waiting.
